stemHtml: Regarding the handling of the cargo, which statement is correct?

options.a: Pallets offer better protection than containers against damage to the aeroplane caused by cargo items.
options.b: Containers can be used only in cargo aeroplanes, while pallets can also be used in passenger aeroplanes.
options.c: Containers provide better protection than pallets against damage to the cargo items.
options.d: Containers have a lighter weight structure when compared to pallets with the same floor dimension.
